meta.venue: Acrisure Stadium & NFL Draft Main Stage

roster.need: Defensive depth for Super Bowl window
Franchise QB and skill position help
Traded up to protect C.J. Stroud
Traded up for elite receiving TE
Interior DL and franchise QB path
Traded up to anchor OL for Jefferson
Pass rusher and OL for Daniels

trades.headline: Texans trade up to #4 — Will Campbell
trades.description: Houston sends #24, a 2026 second-rounder, and a 2027 second-round pick to Jacksonville for the #4 overall selection.
trades.analysis: Houston's front office bets on Will Campbell as the blindside anchor to protect C.J. Stroud for the next decade.

trades.headline: Vikings trade up to #7 — Kelvin Banks Jr.
trades.description: Minnesota sends #32, a 2026 second-rounder, and a 2027 first-round pick to Carolina for the #7 overall selection.
trades.analysis: Minnesota makes a massive investment in offensive line to protect Justin Jefferson and build around their new era.

trades.headline: Rams trade up one spot to #25 — Colston Loveland
trades.description: The Rams send #26 and a 2026 second-rounder to San Francisco to move up one spot for Michigan TE Colston Loveland.
trades.analysis: McVay targets his elite receiving tight end, giving Stafford a dynamic weapon in the red zone and on crossing routes.

picks.notes: Elite arm talent and football IQ; can make every throw with anticipation; dual-threat ability adds crucial dimension.
Historic two-way prospect; shutdown corner with elite route-running as a receiver — generational talent.
Explosive first-step and elite bend; relentless motor; projects as a Pro Bowl pass-rusher from day one.
Polished technician with elite feet; anchor strength vs. power rushers; ready-made franchise left tackle.
Disruptive interior force; elite leverage and hand usage; clogs gaps and generates relentless interior pressure.
Big-bodied X receiver with exceptional hands and RAC ability; natural ball-tracker with elite contested-catch rate.
Technically sound left tackle prospect; excellent pass-set footwork; dominant in pass protection throughout college career.
Versatile safety who can play both deep and in the box; elite range and natural ball-hawking instincts.
Motor runs hot on every snap; elite athleticism and pass-rush repertoire; consistent double-digit sack producer.
Dynamic slot receiver and after-catch nightmare; elusive with the ball in space; high-floor NFL starter.
Raw but explosive DT with unmatched upside; leverage issues to iron out but elite penetration ability at the next level.
Swiss-army-knife defender; can rush from the edge or drop into coverage; elite athleticism for the position.
Freak athlete at safety; elite speed and physicality; plays downhill with force and has sideline-to-sideline range.
Plus athlete at tackle; raw technician but rare combination of size, length, and movement skills at the position.
Physical specimen at tackle; powerful run blocker; needs to refine pass-set technique but ceiling is sky-high.
Lightning-fast first-step and elite pursuit; versatile defender effective against both the run and pass.
Long, athletic edge rusher with diverse pass-rush moves; improving technique and high upside for NFL scheme.

cfn.notes: Rare combination of size and explosiveness; disruptive interior presence who can play all three downs.
Powerful downhill runner with underrated receiving ability; consistent production in an elite offense.
Patient pass-protector with solid technique; reliable starter who won't wow but is rarely beaten.
Complete receiver with excellent route tree; reliable hands and consistent separation; high-floor starter.
Long-armed power rusher with excellent motor; wins with leverage and counter moves; scheme-versatile.
Explosive deep threat with elite speed; contested-catch ability and big-play potential.
Elite receiving tight end with soft hands and YAC ability; exceptional blocker for his position.
Under-the-radar prospect from Toledo with elite athleticism; projects as high-impact interior rusher.
Home-run threat with elite burst and receiving skills; injury history is the only concern for this dynamic back.
Speedy slot receiver with excellent route-running; creates consistent separation and dangerous after the catch.
Tall, press-man corner with long arms and elite recovery speed; potential lockdown No. 1 corner.
Technically refined tackle prospect; quick feet and sound technique; should compete for starting role immediately.
Instinctive linebacker with elite range and pass-rush utility; versatile defender for modern NFL schemes.
Powerful interior lineman with experience at multiple positions; NFL-ready blocker with championship pedigree.
Veteran college QB with elite football IQ and accuracy; NFL-ready mental processing.
Massive interior lineman who eats blocks and creates havoc; natural run-stopper.
Instinctive box safety with range; plays above his size and shows excellent feel in zone coverage.
High-effort edge rusher with developing technique; projects as a rotational starter early.
Physical interior lineman; dominant as a run blocker with room to grow in pass protection.
Long, physical corner with press-man instincts; needs refinement but high ceiling.
Dual-threat QB with a cannon arm; raw processor but unmatched athletic ability and upside.
Undersized but explosive DT who wins with quickness and relentless motor.
Physical corner with press instincts; struggles against speed but excels in man coverage.
Physical slot receiver who wins at the catch point; chain-mover with reliable hands.
Versatile edge defender who can also line up inside; high motor and developing pass-rush arsenal.
Precise route-runner who creates consistent separation in the slot; elite YAC threat.
Potential top-10 talent falling due to knee injury; elite pass-set technique when healthy.
Fluid athlete with zone coverage instincts; needs to improve physicality at the line.
Smart, instinctive safety who reads quarterbacks well; limited athleticism but high football IQ.
Athletic receiving TE with smooth routes; needs to develop as a blocker but offense-first weapon.
Long, physical edge rusher; effective bull rusher who needs to expand his counter-move repertoire.
Instinctive linebacker with play-making ability against the run; needs to improve in coverage.
Explosive speed back who excels in outside zone; receiving ability adds dimension to offense.
Fluid cover corner with solid instincts; ball-hawking ability shown throughout college career.
Size-speed combo at receiver; still developing route refinement but big-play ability is clear.
Powerful inside runner with excellent vision; excels in power blocking schemes.
Explosive slot weapon with elite quickness; natural playmaker with the ball in his hands.
Massive tackle with natural leverage; raw but intriguing physical tools for the position.
Reliable receiving TE who creates mismatches; smart route-runner with dependable hands.
FCS prospect with NFL-caliber athleticism; dominant at lower level, potential high-upside starter.
Press corner with good length; instinctive ball-tracker who competes at the catch point.
Enormous nose tackle who eats double-teams; frees up linebackers in 3-4 scheme.
Instinctive free safety with good range; reliable tackler who processes quickly.
Balanced TE who can block and catch; reliable option in both phases of the game.
Smart, versatile safety who understands coverage nuances; reliable in the back end.
High-production receiver from non-power conference; proved himself as a consistent separator.
